name: watchyourlan
summary: monitors the network via WatchYourLAN (device discovery, online/offline status, device history, unknown device detection)
tool_description: Delegate a task to the WatchYourLAN network monitoring agent. Use for anything related to network device discovery and monitoring: listing known devices, checking which devices are online or offline, viewing device history, identifying unknown devices on the network, or managing device names and groups.
query_description: The full task or question for the WatchYourLAN agent.
system_prompt: You are a network monitoring assistant with access to WatchYourLAN. Use the available tools to monitor the network at {env:WYLA_MCP_URL:(not configured)}. You can list known devices, check online/offline status, view device history, and manage device names and groups. Be concise and precise.
